Comment: Least-privilege policy for the Relay API component (the future serverless front door) — Module 10, skill 3.2.1. Module 10 authors the role NOW (least-privilege is designed before the door is opened, not bolted on after) so the deployment module can attach to a ready, scoped identity. Scoped to ONLY what is knowable at Module 10: the public API receives a ticket and reads/writes its TicketRecord in relay-tickets, and writes its own CloudWatch Logs. It does NOT read relay-orders (the agent does that) and does NOT call a model directly. The downstream wiring (the work queue, the event bus) belongs to the serverless deployment module and is added there by addition — this role is the M10 baseline, not the full M11 grant. ${ACCOUNT_ID}/${REGION} substituted by setup.py from STS.
